events.text: Goal! Argentina 1, Austria 0. Lionel Messi (Argentina) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Facundo Medina following a fast break.
Stefan Posch (Austria) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Argentina. Nicolás Otamendi replaces Cristian Romero.
Substitution, Argentina. Julián Alvarez replaces Thiago Almada.
Substitution, Argentina. Nico González replaces Lautaro Martínez.
Substitution, Austria. Marco Friedl replaces David Alaba.
Substitution, Austria. Alexander Prass replaces Stefan Posch.
Substitution, Austria. Marko Arnautovic replaces Paul Wanner.
Facundo Medina (Argentina) is shown the yellow card.
Konrad Laimer (Austria) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Austria. Patrick Wimmer replaces Romano Schmid.
Substitution, Argentina. Leandro Paredes replaces Rodrigo De Paul.
Substitution, Argentina. Nicolás Tagliafico replaces Facundo Medina.
Substitution, Austria. Carney Chukwuemeka replaces Michael Gregoritsch.
Leandro Paredes (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Argentina 2, Austria 0. Lionel Messi (Argentina) left footed shot from the left side of the six yard box to the centre of the goal following a fast break.
